title: ‘Pakistan don't have 190 strike-rate batters’: PSL coach’s candid admission
content: Former Pakistan all-rounder Azhar Mahmood defended Babar Azam, deeming it unfair to single him out for strike-rate issues in T20 cricket, arguing Pakistan lacks ultra-aggressive batters in the format. Mahmood emphasised that Babar sets the platform for others, and realistic expectations are needed, as the country doesn't possess consistently high-strike-rate players.

title: Setback for Vijay: Madras HC flags 'Rs 100 cr irregularity' in TVK chief's affidavit
content: A Bench comprising chief justice SA Dharmadhikari and Justice G Arul Murugan issued notices to Vijay, along with the Director General of Income Tax (Investigation), the Election Commission of India (ECI), and the Returning Officers for the Perambur and Tiruchirappalli (East) constituencies. The petitioner has alleged that the disappearance of a high-value asset amounts to a clear case of suppression of assets, raising serious concerns regarding beneficial ownership, routing of funds, and the concealment of material particulars.

title: Siemens CEO says company to prioritise AI investments in the US and China over Europe
content: Siemens, Europe's largest engineering firm, is threatening to shift AI investments to the US and China, citing restrictive EU regulations. CEO Roland Busch argues that the EU's AI and Data Acts unfairly burden industrial AI with consumer-level oversight. German Chancellor Friedrich Merz also supports revising the framework, calling current rules overly restrictive.

title: Summer rush sorted: Indian Railways rolls out over 900 special trains
content: Indian Railways is launching 908 summer special trains, operating 18,262 trips between April 15 and July 15, 2026, to manage increased passenger demand. This initiative aims to ease waiting lists and enhance travel convenience across the country. A significant portion of these services is already open for booking.

title: 'Nitish Kumar was compromised': Rahul's big claim on 'Sushasan Babu's' Bihar exit
content: Rahul Gandhi has attacked the NDA. He claimed Nitish Kumar was compromised during his Tamil Nadu campaign. Nitish Kumar recently moved to the Rajya Sabha. This marks a significant shift in Bihar politics. The BJP will now lead the government in Bihar. The NDA secured a landslide victory in the Bihar assembly elections.

title: Anthropic CEO 'knows absolutely nothing' about AI effects on jobs, says godfather of AI
content: AI expert Yann LeCun disagrees with Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei's forecast of AI eliminating many entry-level jobs. LeCun suggests economists are better equipped to analyze technological impacts on employment. Amodei previously warned AI could replace a significant portion of white-collar roles within five years, calling AI a general labor substitute.

title: TCS Nashik case: No court relief for absconding pregnant employee
content: A pregnant TCS employee in Nashik, accused of religious harassment, was denied interim relief by the court. She sought anticipatory bail, citing her pregnancy and arguing she's not the main accused. The court will hear her plea again on April 27. The case involves allegations of hurting religious sentiments.

title: ‘All adjectives fall short’: Shreyas Iyer hails Sooryavanshi as ‘one for the future’
content: Punjab Kings skipper Shreyas Iyer lauded Rajasthan Royals' teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi as a "spectacular talent" and "one for the future" after his explosive IPL 2026 campaign. Iyer emphasized the importance of self-belief and playing fearlessly in T20 cricket, a philosophy he sees reflected in Sooryavanshi's game and his own openers.

title: 'Bhooth Bangla' box office day 4: Akshay Kumar starrer records mild weekday growth
content: 'Bhooth Bangla,' featuring Akshay Kumar, has burst onto the cinematic scene, creeping close to Rs 100 crore in worldwide earnings over its opening weekend. This horror-comedy, helmed by Priyadarshan, saw an impressive Rs 58.75 crore net in India by the fourth day. Viewers are embracing the film with enthusiasm, making the weekday box office performance a hot topic of discussion. Read on to know more in detail.

title: Massive fire at Rajasthan HPCL refinery ahead of PM Narendra Modi's launch event
content: A major fire erupted at the HPCL Pachpadra Refinery in Balotra on Monday, just a day before Prime Minister Narendra Modi's scheduled inauguration. The blaze, reportedly originating from an exchanger explosion at the main refinery unit, triggered panic. Firefighters and district administration teams swiftly responded, evacuating employees safely. Damage assessment awaits fire control.

title: 'I'm also someone’s father': Message inside a Pune auto touching hearts across India
content: A simple message inside a Pune auto-rickshaw, "Your safety is important to me," resonated deeply with content creator Unnati Devaliya.  The driver, Datta Rumale, a humble family man, was later identified and visited. His genuine kindness, even returning change and water, highlighted the profound impact of simple, caring gestures in everyday life.

title: Iran has closed Hormuz completely: What this means for India’s crude, LPG, LNG supplies?
content: Data from MarineTraffic shows that several Indian and foreign ships headed for Indian ports are still awaiting clearance near the Strait of Hormuz. According to the petroleum ministry, 17 vessels have been identified for evacuation.

title: 'No plans for talks with US': Iran hardens stance as ceasefire deadline looms
content: Iran has hardened its stance on US talks, stating negotiations will not occur "at any cost." This comes as the US threatens severe action if a deal isn't reached. Tehran emphasizes that diplomacy is linked to military posture and depends on national interests and constructive feedback from the US.

title: 'From chips to ships': PM Modi hails India-South Korea ties; signs several MoUs
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi welcomed South Korean President Lee Jae Myung, highlighting the deepening India-South Korea ties. Both leaders expressed commitment to transforming their trusted partnership into a futuristic one, aiming to boost bilateral trade to $50 billion by 2030 and enhance cooperation across various sectors, including strategic industries and the Indo-Pacific region.

title: Is Hormuz still operational? How gunfire, vessel seizure are testing the Iran-US ceasefire
content: The Strait of Hormuz faces severe disruption after a weekend of escalations, including ships coming under gunfire and a US seizure of an Iranian vessel. Commercial movement is chaotic, with vessels reversing course or drifting amid conflicting instructions. This directly confronts the fragile ceasefire, pushing the vital energy corridor to the brink.

title: India's power boost: T&D sector to remain strong, supported by Rs 9 lakh crore capex push
content: India's T&D sector is poised for significant growth, driven by nearly Rs 9 trillion in planned investments through 2032. Despite a recent slowdown in new project orders due to manufacturing constraints, the sector remains robust, fueled by renewable energy expansion and strong domestic and global demand.

title: ‘Gukesh has weaknesses, Sindarov does not’: Carlsen’s bold World C'ship prediction
content: Magnus Carlsen has declared Javokhir Sindarov the favourite to win the upcoming World Chess Championship against D Gukesh, citing Sindarov's well-rounded game.  Sindarov's dominant Candidates Tournament performance, where he remained unbeaten, has impressed chess legends.  Despite this, Gukesh's renowned mental resilience and ability to defend difficult positions remain significant factors in this historic, generational duel.

title: 21 dead, several injured as bus falls into gorge in J&K’s Udhampur
content: A devastating bus accident in Udhampur, Jammu and Kashmir, claimed at least 21 lives and left several injured as the vehicle plunged into a gorge. Rescue operations are underway, with authorities confirming heavy casualties are anticipated. Efforts are being made to provide medical aid and airlift critically wounded passengers.

title: Virat Kohli, Anushka Sharma visit Vrindavan during RCB break; videos go viral
content: Virat Kohli and Anushka Sharma visited Vrindavan for a spiritual retreat, attending an "Ekantik Vartalaap" with Premanand Ji Maharaj. This marks their third visit in five months, highlighting their growing inclination towards faith. The couple was seen quietly listening to the guru's discourse among devotees.

title: Watch: Russia’s Tuapse refinery on fire after Ukraine strikes; two ships struck in Crimea
content: Ukraine has intensified its attacks on Russian, targeting its military and energy targets. Overnight drone strikes targeted two Russian landing ships in Sevastopol Bay of Crimea. The Tuapse oil refinery was also hit for the second time in a week. Russian officials confirmed damage to transport infrastructure at Tuapse port. One person was killed and another injured in the latest strike.

title: 'Black magic' in IPL? Lalit Modi reveals 'one owner did this' in 2011
content: A viral video of a Sunrisers Hyderabad fan performing a lemon ritual during an IPL match coincided with Shivam Dube's dismissal, sparking 'black magic' accusations. An unverified letter claiming CSK complained to the IPL has also circulated. Former IPL commissioner Lalit Modi alleged similar past incidents involving team owners.

title: 'His impatience wouldn’t be helpful': Aides kept Trump out of war room during high-stakes Iran op
content: A US jet downed over Iran caused turmoil in the White House. President Donald Trump pushed for immediate rescue of two missing airmen. Officials planned a complex mission to retrieve them from Iranian territory. One airman was quickly recovered. The second was rescued after over 24 hours behind enemy lines. This averted a major setback for the administration.

title: Manipur board HSE class 12 result 2026 released: Check direct link to download
content: The Council of Higher Secondary Education, Manipur (COHSEM) has announced the Manipur Board Higher Secondary Examination (HSE) Class 12 result 2026 on April 20, 2026. Students can now check their provisional marksheets online using their roll number and date of birth. The exams for Arts, Science, and Commerce streams were conducted from February 17 to March 20, 2026.

title: Boost to India–South Korea ties: PM Modi, Lee Jae Myung hold talks at Hyderabad House
content: Prime Minister Modi and South Korean President Lee Jae Myung held high-level talks in Delhi, aiming to transform their trusted partnership into a futuristic one. The leaders witnessed the exchange of MoUs, covering cooperation in sectors from chips to ships, talent to technology, and energy.

title: Ponting furious after Shashank fielding blunder; Iyer laughs it off after match
content: Punjab Kings secured a dominant 54-run victory over Lucknow Super Giants, powered by Priyansh Arya's 93 and Cooper Connolly's 87, setting a season-high 254. Despite fielding lapses that frustrated coach Ricky Ponting, the team's strong batting performance propelled them to the top of the IPL table. Captain Shreyas Iyer later diffused tension with Shashank Singh, who dropped crucial catches.

title: Boost for energy sector: PM Modi to inaugurate Rs 79,450 crore petrochemical refinery — top things to know
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi will inaugurate a significant refinery-cum-petrochemical complex in Rajasthan's Pachpadra. Developed by HPCL and the state government, this Rs 79,450 crore facility boasts a 9 MMTPA refining capacity and 2.4 MMTPA petrochemical output. Expected to commence commercial operations in July 2026, it aims to bolster India's energy security and reduce import reliance.

title: ‘We take notes ...’: Cooper Connolly reveals secret behind Punjab Kings’ dream run
content: Punjab Kings maintain their unbeaten IPL 2026 streak, driven by a strong dressing-room culture and a focus on collective improvement. All-rounder Cooper Connolly highlighted the team's collaborative approach and captain Shreyas Iyer's leadership in fostering a positive environment. Their dominant performances, including a significant partnership, underscore their status as a formidable contender.

title: Fly91 flight to Hubballi diverted to Bengaluru amid bad weather; passengers seen in distress
content: A Fly91 flight from Hyderabad to Hubballi was diverted to Bengaluru on Sunday due to adverse weather, causing anxiety among its 22 passengers. The aircraft circled Hubballi for an hour before heading to Bengaluru, eventually returning to Hubballi later that night after conditions improved. Such diversions are standard safety procedures.

title: Making of India’s 95th GM: Aronyak Ghosh, from chasing tournament fees to parents’ relief
content: Aronyak Ghosh achieved his long-awaited Grandmaster title after a remarkable performance at the 23rd BCC Open 2026 in Bangkok. The 22-year-old's journey, marked by his father's dedication and the family's financial sacrifices, culminated in securing his third GM norm. This achievement signifies the success of years of commitment to the game, with chess now being Aronyak's primary focus.

title: 'Not a routine action': Cong says TN chief 'confined' under pretext of IT 'search' ahead of rally
content: Congress alleges the Income Tax department "unlawfully confined" Tamil Nadu chief K Selvaperunthagai, calling it a "blatant misuse" of agencies by the BJP to obstruct opposition campaigning ahead of Rahul Gandhi's visit. The party claims this is intimidation, not routine action, aimed at silencing dissent during a crucial election period.

title: Iran war impact: China’s dependence on US ethane deepens; set to import record volume
content: Ethane, a natural gas liquid, is mainly used to produce ethylene, a core input for plastics. China relies almost entirely on the United States for these supplies.

title: WrestleMania 42 Night 2 takeaways: Will Reigns make this title run alone?
content: Roman Reigns is champion once again, but what should fans expect in the latest title reign of the OTC?

title: Wemby tops Duncan with 35 in Spurs playoff debut
content: Victor Wembanyama scored 35 points, the most by a Spurs player making his postseason debut, while leading a 111-98 win over the Trail Blazers in Game 1 of their first-round series Sunday night.

title: Sabres surge in 3rd for 1st playoff win in 15 years
content: Buffalo overcame a two-goal deficit in the final eight minutes to beat the Bruins 4-3 on Sunday night in the Sabres' first playoff game in 15 years.

title: OK State lands top transfer Crooks from Iowa St.
content: Former Iowa State center Audi Crooks, No. 1 in ESPN's women's basketball transfer rankings, committed to Oklahoma State, she announced Sunday night.

title: 'We belong here': Magic stun Pistons in Game 1
content: The Magic showed an intensity and fight that had been missing for most of the season as they stunned No. 1 seed Detroit in Game 1 of their series.

title: Cooper: Penalty 'stupidity' cost Lightning in G1
content: Lightning coach Jon Cooper was not happy with the penalties his team committed in its Game 1 overtime loss to the Canadiens on Sunday.

title: Bengals extend Lawrence after blockbuster trade
content: Defensive tackle Dexter Lawrence II passed his physical with the Bengals and signed a one-year, $28 million extension, the Win Sports Group told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

title: Indiana DC claps back at Simpson, Alabama fans
content: Indiana defensive coordinator Bryant Haines heard the comments from former Alabama quarterback Ty Simpson about the teams' matchup last season in the Rose Bowl and responded with his own observations.

title: 'Gonna get loud': Mets head home as skid hits 11
content: Nico Hoerner hit a sacrifice fly off Craig Kimbrel in the 10th inning as the Cubs extended the Mets' losing streak to 11 games by rallying for a 2-1 victory.

title: 🏈 Kiper: Favorites from this year's NFL draft class
content: Mel Kiper Jr.'s annual list of NFL draft favorites includes two speedy receivers, three undersized cornerbacks and some gritty linemen.

title: Reid's seven-round NFL mock draft: A forecast of every pick from No. 1 to No. 257
content: Jordan Reid projected every single pick for this week's NFL draft, from the Raiders' selection at No. 1 to 'Mr. Irrelevant.'

title: Schefter's draft intel: Everything he's hearing ahead of Round 1
content: How early could Jeremiyah Love be drafted? Could we still see A.J. Brown traded? Adam Schefter has the latest.

title: Early MLB trade deadline preview: Player most likely to be traded for all 30 teams
content: From major league stars to prospects to if-all-goes-wrong candidates, here's who could be on the trade block come August.

title: Ranking the top 50 players in the 2026 Stanley Cup playoffs
content: As 16 teams face off for the ultimate prize in pro sports, these players will have the biggest impact.

title: Stanley Cup playoffs daily: Can the Stars, Penguins and Senators even things up?
content: Plus, the Oilers and Ducks finally join the party. Here's what to watch, along with Sunday's highlights and stats.

title: Windhorst: The five biggest lessons from the first weekend of the NBA playoffs
content: A 25-year-old LeBron strategy for the Lakers, a new defense in Cleveland and a message from Oklahoma City: Here's what we learned as the postseason tipped off.

title: Even in retirement, Chris Paul's legacy is rooted in this season's playoffs
content: Dozens of NBA players have been mentored by the future Hall of Famer, and many of them are vying for the title.

title: Blockbuster trade? New coach? Hard reset? The Warriors begin an offseason with massive uncertainty
content: Golden State enters another offseason in search of a co-star for Stephen Curry, and the Warriors might be searching for a new coach too.

title: 'Nobody was going to beat the 10th pick:' How the Bengals wooed the Giants into trading vet Dexter Lawrence
content: Lawrence informed the Giants he wanted a new deal or trade, the Giants didn't want to let him go -- until the price was right.

title: Women's transfer rankings: No. 1 Audi Crooks commits to Oklahoma State
content: Audi Crooks is headed to Oklahoma St., Jordan Lee is bound for South Carolina and Kymora Johnson is staying at U.Va.

title: Hannah Green wins third LA Championship in four years
content: Hannah Green won the JM Eagle LA Championship on Sunday for the third time in our years and the first at El Caballero.

title: Arsenal are still Premier League title favorites, and here's why
content: Arsenal suffered a huge blow to their Premier League title hopes in Sunday's 2-1 defeat at Manchester City, but they still have reason for optimism.

title: At a crucial stage in the season, Man City take control of the title race over Arsenal
content: Manchester City's win over Arsenal becomes a huge confidence boost for Pep Guardiola's side in the title race.

title: Tyler Reddick rolls in OT, wins fifth Cup Series race
content: Tyler Reddick became just the fourth driver to win five of the first nine NASCAR Cup Series races in a season, and the first since Dale Earnhardt nearly four decades ago, when he passed Kyle Larson on the final lap of overtime at Kansas Speedway Sunday.

title: The biggest question facing every WNBA team in training camp
content: How will Angel Reese fit the Dream? Will the Wings return to the playoffs? Can Caitlin Clark remain healthy?

title: Draft guide: Rankings, strategies and more
content: Everything you need to know before your fantasy women's basketball draft, including rankings, tips and news.

title: Why Jimmy Johnson cautions Jets that making right picks more valuable than stockpiling them
content: With eight picks in the first and second rounds, New York sits where the former Cowboys coach was 35 years ago.

title: Inside the fallout of the Dianna Russini and Mike Vrabel photos
content: How Dianna Russini and New England Patriots coach Mike Vrabel scrambled to respond to photos published in the New York Post.

title: Jon Rahm wins in Mexico, capping wild week for LIV
content: Jon Rahm capped off a chaotic week on LIV Golf when he closed with a 7-under 64 on Sunday for a six-shot victory in LIV Golf Mexico City.

title: 10 NFL draft prospects to put on your fantasy radar -- and three others to monitor
content: With the NFL draft nearly upon us, it's time to think about how the top prospects will fare in fantasy.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Barcelona step up interest in Italy right back
content: Barcelona are stepping up their pursuit of Atalanta right back Marco Palestra, while Arsenal remain interested in Julián Álvarez.

title: National seminar at CPCRI Kayamkulam to address biosecurity threats in horticultural crops
content: Seminar aims at raising awareness within the scientific community of invasive plants, pests, and diseases

title: Pradhan claims ‘chaos, corruption’ in Trinamool Congress-led West Bengal
content: Days ahead of polling for the first phase on April 23, the BJP leader alleges that law and order has collapsed in the State and that corruption and the ‘syndicate raj’ have weakened administrative structures, hindering development

title: Kochi Chander Kunj apartment owners file contempt plea against Army Welfare Housing Organisation over rent default
content: A total of 200 owners are waiting for the second tranche of rent for the six months beginning March, 2026, say the Chander Kunj Army Towers Apartment Owners Association president

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Neck-and-neck race likely in Hosur constituency
content: Growing discontent among farmers regarding big-ticket projects, clash between industrial push and agrarian economy and an infrastructure under pressure are likely to be the major issues influencing voter decisions

title: Watch: One year after Pahalgam attack, Kashmir tourism shows signs of revival
content: One year on, after the deadly terror attack in Pahalgam that killed 26 civilians and shook Kashmir’s tourism industry, the Valley is once again showing signs of revival

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: a high-profile contest brews in Mylapore constituency
content: Constituency reflects broader urban churn with residents pointing out civic woes even as national parties look for gains in Tamil Nadu

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Poor delivery of schemes, lack of support for agriculture plagues Madurantakam constituency
content: Farmers say that during the peak season, the DPCs find it difficult to process and move the large volume of paddy that they deposit there. Payments are often delayed too, sometimes for over a month to three months. Irulars in the constituency say they face stigmatisation and live in abject poverty

title: Modi killed bill on women's quota, opposition fought delimitation bill only: Congress' Kharge
content: Taking a jibe at the Prime Minister for campaigning extensively across West Bengal for the Assembly polls, Kharge asked whether Modi wished to become the Chief Minister of the State

title: Congress obstructing women’s empowerment, hurting south’s representation: Lanka Dinakar
content: Congress obstructing women’s empowerment, hurting south’s political representation says Andhra Pradesh BJP leader, Lanka Dinakar

title: Kerala Assembly polls: Returning Officer rejects reports of opening strongroom in Perambra
content: Officer says an unsealed room in a college, where polling records of Perambra constituency were kept, was opened in presence of candidates’ poll agents for the purpose of updating information in software related to election process

title: It's all drama: Mamata on PM making pit stop to buy ‘jhalmuri’ during Bengal poll campaign
content: Mamata Banerjee’s comment came a day after PM Modi made a pit stop during his campaign tour in Jhargram to buy ‘jhalmuri’, a popular Bengali street food

title: Opposition's “regressive mindset” defeated women’s quota Bill, says Fadnavis
content: Mahayuti alliance would now launch a massive outreach campaign to collect one crore signatures from women across the State, aiming to build a "people’s mandate" and expose the Opposition’s anti-women stance, says Maharashtra Chief Minister

title: Madras High Court stays case against BJP leader Annamalai over Muthuramalinga Thevar remarks
content: Justice M. Nirmal Kumar grants the interim stay and also dispenses with the petitioner’s personal appearance before a judicial magistrate court in Salem

title: BJP to reintroduce Women’s Reservation Bill, says Nagothu Ramesh; protests on April 24, 25
content: BJP to reintroduce Women’s Reservation Bill, says BJP Andhra Pradesh general secretary Nagothu Ramesh; party to hold State-wide protests against Congress in Vijayawada on April 24, 25

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Fishing communities in Killiyoor seek adequate emergency measures
content: Being the last Assembly segment of Tamil Nadu, Killiyoor has been a Congress stronghold. Party veterans, including Marshal Nesamony and Ponnappa Nadar, were elected from the constituency.

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Kadayanallur constituency’s long wait for realising its demands continue
content: Since Tenkasi district has neither government engineering college nor medical college, the Kadayanallur voters expect the government to establish these institutions in their segment.

title: Chain-snatching incident during Mathamangalam temple festival in Kannur: two held, two others flee
content: The stolen chain could not be recovered from those detained and the police suspect that it may be with the two women who escaped

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Deterioration of Noyyal, human-animal conflict are key issues in Thondamuthur constituency
content: Agriculture continues to shape the local economy, with coconut, banana, vegetables, and turmeric as the main crops. The areca sheath industry has emerged as a parallel activity, with units producing plates and bowls catering to steady market demand.

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Thirumayam constituency battles a slew of problems
content: Encompassing Thirumayam, Arimalam, and Ponnamaravathy unions, the constituency continues to remain industrially backward necessitating many educated youth to move out in search of employment; farmers complain that sufficient attention has not been paid to water management in this rain-fed region

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Unkept promises to the fore again in Pollachi constituency
content: As hustings draw nearer, DMK is leveraging the sex scandal to dash the hopes of AIADMK, which is highlighting stagnant development in the constituency to get back at its opponent. Residents, however, point out that the promises being made by contestants, regardless of parties, are the same old ones

title: Bapatla forms adventure tourism safety panel; paramotor, jet ski rides launched at Chirala
content: Bapatla sets up district-level safety committee for adventure tourism; Information and Public Relations and Housing Minister Kolusu Parthasarathy launches paramotor and jet ski rides at Chirala

title: Forest fires in Nilgiris largely under control, says Forest department
content: Officials from the Pykara and Parsons Valley ranges estimated that the fire could have affected more than 150 hectares of forest area, but added that a more accurate figure could be revealed only once the fires were fully extinguished

title: Mission Khapli helps farmers get better prices for Emmer wheat favoured by health conscious customers
content: Farmers band together to seek better price for Emmer wheat, which was grown as a subsistence crop by farmers on both banks of the Krishna river in Karnataka and Maharashtra

title: Fire breaks out in Rajasthan HPCL refinery, a day before PM Modi was to inaugurate it
content: The HPCL Rajasthan Refinery Limited (HRRL) refinery is a ₹79,459 crore joint venture between HPCL and the Government of Rajasthan

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Poor roads irk voters at Kavundampalayam constituency
content: In the rapidly developing Kalapatti area, voters say they need better bus connectivity and more street lights.

title: Karnataka CM Siddaramaiah questions BJP for failure to operationalise women’s reservation though Bill was passed in 2023
content: Accusing Narendra Modi and the BJP of being against social justice, Siddaramaiah said the saffron party could have brought in reservation for women during the last 12 years of its rule at the Centre had the party been genuinely in favour of quota for women

title: Ahead of Thrissur Pooram in Kerala, Rajan Gurukkal calls for ban on high-decibel fireworks citing health risks, pollution
content: Warning of the impacts on air pollution, acoustic stress and public health, Prof. Gurukkal highlights the risks of conducting the event in the region with a high concentration of hospitals having labour wards and neonatal intensive care units

title: Chandrababu Naidu has breakfast with workers at Vijayawada Anna Canteen on 76th birthday
content: Chief Minister N. Chandrababu Naidu had breakfast with workers at the Anna Canteen at Patamata in Vijayawada on his birthday

title: Karnataka CM Siddaramaiah shares PM Narendra Modi’s ‘confidential exchange’ at HAL airport in Bengaluru
content: When reporters in Mysuru asked Mr Siddaramaiah about his ‘confidential exchange’ with the Prime Minister, he revealed that Mr. Modi asked him what was his stand on women’s reservation

title: Trinamool Congress Kerala unit severs ties with national leadership, to float new party by May 15
content: P.V. Anvar, Kerala State convener of Trinamool Congress, says resolution passed to reposition unit as ‘a secular, democratic, and socialist political outfit’ aligned with politics of Congress and UDF, and will ‘oppose Pinarayism and fascism’

title: Defence Chief General Anil Chauhan in U.K. for training, operations dialogue
content: Representatives of the British defence industry are scheduled to meet General Chauhan to progress talks on greater defence co-production between the two countries

title: Kerala issues surgical safety protocol after alleged hospital lapses spark row
content: According to an order dated April 15, the new guidelines mandate strict pre-operative verification, patient identification, and enhanced documentation to ensure patient safety across all healthcare institutions in the State

title: Kashmir commuters suffer as transporters protest Smart City bus expansion
content: The All Jammu and Kashmir Transporters' Welfare Association, on April 19  called for a Valley-wide 'chakka jam' (road blockade) over fears that the move may threaten their livelihoods

title: PM Modi to inaugurate India's 1st greenfield integrated refinery-cum-petrochemical complex in Rajasthan
content: This project, with an investment of more than ₹79,450 crore, represents a significant milestone in India's energy and petrochemical sector, says official statement

title: Wayanad township row: ‘Not cracks, just shrinkage’, says Kerala Revenue Minister on govt-built houses
content: K. Rajan says ‘such shrinkages’ have been detected in two of the 178 houses constructed for landslide survivors

title: Issue was not women’s reservation but Modi preservation: Congress slams government
content: The Congress asserted that women would not be fooled by the “BJP propaganda” on the women’s quota issue as they know that the ruling party wants to push its political agenda in their name

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Full potentials of Tenkasi constituency untapped
content: Tenkasi Assembly segment’s economy is based on agriculture and Courtallam-based tourism activities; unfortunately, both the livelihood activities are yet to thrive in a big way.

title: Shocking that well-educated people getting duped in digital arrest cases: CJI Surya Kant
content: The CJI, who was heading a Bench which also comprised Justice Joymalya Bagchi, flagged the recent case of an old woman who was duped of her entire retirement benefits in one of such cases

title: VACB launches ‘Operation Earth Guard’ to curb illegal soil mining in Kerala
content: Statewide drive finds that permits and transit passes issued for house-building purposes are being misused to extract and transport soil far beyond permissible limits

title: ED searches premises linked to Karnataka Congress MLA Haris, among other places, in crypto case
content: Searches were also carried out at locations associated with Aqeeb Khan, grandson of former Union Minister K. Rahman Khan

title: Until I am the tourism minister, casinos will not come up in Karnataka: H.K. Patil
content: Tourism Minister H.K. Patil says tourism should be about education, enlightenment and meaningful leisure

title: T.N. elections: RSS trying to rule Tamil Nadu by proxy, says Rahul Gandhi
content: “The RSS is planning to, and trying to, rule Tamil Nadu by proxy. The same way Donald Trump [President of the United States] controls the Prime Minister of India, the Prime Minister of India wants to control Tamil Nadu through the AIADMK,” alleged Mr. Gandhi

title: Rajnath to undertake 3-day visit to Germany; boosting defence, industrial ties main focus
content: There is a possibility that the two Defence Ministers may also finalise an inter-governmental agreement for supplying six stealth submarines to the Indian Navy

title: 21 dead, over 27 injured after bus falls off road in Jammu’s Udhampur
content: Accident took place around 10 a.m. in the hilly area of Ramnagar; locals and teams of multiple security agencies worked together to shift the injured to hospital

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Infrastructure struggles to keep pace with Ramanathapuram constituency’s tourism growth
content: While the region endured over a decade of tension during the Sri Lankan civil war, it now remains politically volatile owing to the frequent arrests of Tamil fishermen by Sri Lankan Navy.

title: TNCC chief Selvaperunthagai alleges ‘unlawful confinement’ amid I-T raids at residence
content: Mr. Selvaperunthagai alleged that the “deliberate action, carried out at a politically sensitive moment, is a clear and calculated attempt to obstruct democratic functioning and weaken the activities of the Opposition.”

title: India, South Korea decide to start negotiations to upgrade economic pact
content: In this era of global tensions, India and South Korea together convey a message of peace and stability, PM Modi said after the talks

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Industrial pollution remains unsolved in Ranipet constituency
content: Another issue that plagues voters in the constituency is the lack of proper connectivity by buses and trains

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Sankari constituency demands ‘auto nagar’, solution to traffic congestion
content: Vehicle movement is affected in Sankari town as the roads are narrow in many places. It is a long-pending demand of the lorry owners to develop an ‘auto nagar’ in Sankari.

title: At least 404 candidates in Tamil Nadu have serious criminal cases against them: Report
